stem.content:
\begin{tikzpicture}[scale=0.8]
    % Draw cuboid
    \draw[thick] (0,0) -- (3,0) -- (3,2) -- (0,2) -- cycle; % front face
    \draw[thick] (0,0) -- (0.5,0.5); % depth line
    \draw[thick] (3,0) -- (3.5,0.5); % depth line
    \draw[thick] (3,2) -- (3.5,2.5); % depth line
    \draw[thick] (0,2) -- (0.5,2.5); % depth line
    \draw[thick] (0.5,0.5) -- (3.5,0.5) -- (3.5,2.5) -- (0.5,2.5) -- cycle; % back face

    % Labels
    \node at (1.5,-0.3) {12 cm};
    \node at (-0.3,1) {15 cm};
    \node at (3.8,1.25) {4 cm};
    \node at (4,2.8) {NOT TO SCALE};
\end{tikzpicture}

The diagram shows a cuboid measuring 15 cm by 12 cm by 4 cm.
